name: PT Atlas Resources Tbk
summary: PT Atlas Resources Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the mining, exploration, development, production, and sale of coal primarily in Indonesia and internationally. It produces a range of low to high calorific value thermal coal, as well as metallurgical coal for use in steel production, power generation, cement, and general manufacturing. The company holds various mining concessions covering a total area of approximately 200,000 hectares in Indonesia. In addition, it is involved in trading, services, construction, transportation, printing, industrial, logistics, investment, and agricultural activities. Further, the company operates workshops. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
